name: Druddigon
flavor: Druddigon lives in caves, but it never skips sunbathing—it won’t be able to move if its body gets too cold.

ability.name: Rough Skin
ability.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, do 20 damage to the Attacking Pokémon.
